transcript: Speaker A (AI): What happened? Speaker B (Human): This outfit is matching with this new earrings? Speaker A (AI): Ritu, ithu thettaya English aanu, ingane parayoo, 'Does this outfit match these earrings?' [Ritu, this is incorrect English, say it like this: 'Does this outfit match these earrings?'] Speaker B (Human): Okay. Does this outfit match with this new earrings? Speaker A (AI): Perfect. Speaker B (Human): ithu kollam, valare easy aayirunnu. [This is good, it was very easy.] Speaker A (AI): English padikkan valare easy aanu. [Learning English is very easy.] Speaker B (Human): Randu muthal maasam aayi English padikkan try cheyyunnu, pakshe enne kondu kazhiyunnulla. [I've been trying to learn English for two to three months, but I haven't been able to do it.] Speaker A (AI): Nee SpeakX app try cheyyu. [You try the SpeakX app.] Speaker B (Human): SpeakX app? Speaker A (AI): Ithu oru AI English teaching app aanu. Ivide ente pole AI teachers English samsarikkan padippikkukayum practice cheyyikkukayum cheyyum. Nee ennodu enthengilum chodikku, njan athinte English paranju tharum, pinne athu practice cheyyikkum. Thettayi paranjal correct cheyyum, oru real human teacher pole. Nithyam pathu pathinanju minute ennodu English samsarikkan practice cheyyu, pathinanju irupathu divasathinullil nalla fluent aayi samsarikkan padikkum. [This is an AI English teaching app. Here, AI teachers like me will teach you to speak English and make you practice. Ask me anything, I will tell you the English for it, and then make you practice. If you say it wrong, I will correct it, like a real human teacher. Practice speaking English with me for 10 to 15 minutes daily, and you will learn to speak fluently within 15 to 20 days.] Speaker B (Human): AI teacher aavumpol ithu costly aavoolle? [Since it's an AI teacher, won't it be expensive?] Speaker A (AI): Illa. Just naalu rupees per day il ezhu divasathe trial kittum. [No. You get a 7-day trial for just 4 rupees per day.] Speaker B (Human): Ohh... ithu mumbil arinjillayirunnu, njan ippo thanne SpeakX app download cheyyunnu. [Oh... I didn't know this before, I will download the SpeakX app right now.]
on_screen_text: What happened? / This outfit is matching with this new earrings? / Ritu, ithu thettaya English aanu, ingane parayoo, Does this outfit match these earrings? [Ritu, this is incorrect English, say it like this, Does this outfit match these earrings?] / Does this outfit match with this new earrings? / Perfect. / ithu valare easy aayirunnu. [this was very easy.] / English padikkan valare easy aanu. [learning English is very easy.] / Randu muthal maasam aayi English padikkan try cheyyunnu, pakshe sariyayi samsarikkan kazhiyunnilla. [trying to learn English for two to three months, but unable to speak correctly.] / Nee SpeakX app try cheyyu. [You try SpeakX app.] / SpeakX app? / Ithu oru AI English teaching app aanu. [This is an AI English teaching app.] / Ivide ente pole AI teachers English samsarikkan padippikkukayum practice cheyyikkukayum cheyyum. [Here AI teachers like me will teach you to speak English and make you practice.] / Nee enthengilum chodikku, English paranju tharum, pinne athu practice cheyyikkum. [You ask something, will tell you the English, then will make you practice.] / Thettayi paranjal correct cheyyum, oru real human teacher pole. [If said incorrectly will correct, like a real human teacher.] / muthal pathinanju minute ennode English samsarikkan practice cheyyu, pathinanju irupathu divasathinullil nalla fluent aayi samsarikkan padikkum. [practice speaking English with me for 10 to 15 minutes, will learn to speak fluently within 15 to 20 days.] / AI teachers undenkil expensive aayirikkum alle? [If there are AI teachers it will be expensive, right?] / Illa. Just naalu rupees per day il ezhu divasathe trial kittum. [No. Just four rupees per day will get a seven-day trial.] / Ohhh... ithu mumbil arinjilla entha? Njan ippo thanne SpeakX app download cheyyunnu. [Oh... why didn't I know this before? I am downloading SpeakX app right now.]
summary: A split-screen Malayalam ad where an AI avatar corrects a woman's English grammar. The avatar introduces SpeakX, an AI English learning app that offers interactive practice and corrections. The ad highlights an affordable trial offer of 4 rupees per day for 7 days, prompting the user to download the app.
